messages.content: What can you do? and write me a application, open yt, insta, telegram, twitter, facebook and generate a image of mounteverest and write me a a idea for my next video

I can answer questions, open websites and apps, play music and videos, generate images, write content, and search Google and YouTube. I'm opening YouTube, Instagram, Telegram, Twitter, and Facebook for you. I've generated an image of Mount Everest, it's a stunning view of the highest peak in the world at 8,848 meters. For your next video idea, how about "Conquering the Highest Peak: My Virtual Mount Everest Expedition" where you can share your journey to the summit, highlighting the challenges and scenic beauty encountered along the way.

I've written a basic application for your J.A.R.V.I.S project, it's a conversational AI system with automatic query routing. I've also opened the social media apps as requested. Would you like me to elaborate on the application code or proceed with something else, Alfaaz?
